name: Noble Knight Peredur
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>聖</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>騎</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>士</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>し</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>パーシヴァル
desc: While equipped with a "Noble Arms" Equip Spell Card, this card becomes DARK and its Level is increased by 1. If this card is sent to the Graveyard while equipped with a "Noble Arms" Equip Spell Card: Target 1 "Noble Arms" card in your Graveyard; add that target to your hand.
mnst_eff: While equipped with a "Noble Arms" Equip Spell Card, this card becomes DARK and its Level is increased by 1. If this card is sent to the Graveyard while equipped with a "Noble Arms" Equip Spell Card: Target 1 "Noble Arms" card in your Graveyard; add that target to your hand.
